name: Brownie Kiss Cups
recipeIngredient: 1 package Duncan Hines® chewy fudge brownie mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Place 25 (2-inch) foil liners in muffin pans or on cookie sheets.
2. Combine brownie mix, egg, water and oil in a large bowl. Stir with a spoon until well blended, about 50 strokes. Fill each liner with 2 measuring tablespoons of batter. Bake at 350°F for 17 to 20 minutes. Remove from oven. Place 1 milk chocolate candy kiss on each cupcake.
3. Bake an additional minute.
4. Cool 5 to 10 minutes in pans. Remove to cooling racks. Cool completely.
Makes 25 brownie cups
